title: The MMMMorshu Collection!
description:
And now, for your pleasure, Morshu will MMM some of my favourite video game music themes.
Ladies and gentlemen, here he cummms, MMMORSHU!

Fire Emblem: Path of Radiance - Decisive Attack
Sonic Adventure 2 - Live and Learn
Crash Bandicoot - Map Select
TMNT IV - Turtle Select
Pokèmon Stadium - Mewtwo Battle
